chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.S-1552 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For katcha peshi. 09.10.2017 Mr. Muneer Ahmed Turk, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mahar, State Counsel a/w Inspector Sohail Sarwar o/b of SSP Hyderabad and ASI Nazir Ahmed SHO P.S Nasim Nagar. Respondents No.3 and 4 present in person. = With reference to the notice of the present case, learned A.A.G files parawise comments/statements on behalf of respondents No.5 and 6, which are taken on record and copies whereof have been supplied to the learned Counsel for the petitioner. It is stated in the statements/comments that the controversy between the petitioner and the private respondents is in respect of some matrimonial dispute and in this regard suit for dissolution of marriage and maintenance filed by the petitioner and her minor has already been decided by the Court. It is also stated that the petitioner has never approached to the official respondents for redressal of her grievances nor moved any complaint regarding allegations mentioned in the petition. It is also stated in the comments that the official respondents are bound to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law in the event the petitioner approaches them with such a request. In view of the statements filed by the official respondents, this petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioner, whereas, the official respondents are directed to perform their duties and functions strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner in the event the petitioner approaches them with such a request but strictly in accordance with law.

It is also stated in the comments that the official respondents are bound to provide protection to the petitioner in accordance with law in the event the petitioner approaches them with such a request. In view of the statements filed by the official respondents, this petition is disposed of with direction to the respondents not to cause any harassment to the petitioner, whereas, the official respondents are directed to perform their duties and functions strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioner in the event the petitioner approaches them with such a request but strictly in accordance with law. Respondents No.3 and 4 present in Court also undertake that they will not cause any harassment to the petitioner. Since the private respondents No.1 to 2 namely Sajjad Hussain and Guddo Fauji despite notice are not in attendance, therefore, the concerned SHO is also directed to serve the copy of this order on the above named private respondents by calling them in Police Station and compliance of such service should be furnished with the Additional Registrar of this Court. JUDGE Shahid
